benchmark_spec.prompt_template: Summarize the key engineering tradeoffs of deploying a quantized language model under a fixed GPU memory budget. Focus on accuracy, memory footprint, and inference latency, and explain why a practitioner might choose extra bits or low-rank repair for a single-device deployment setting.

{
  "run_id": "R3_Q17B",

    ]
  },

    "quantizer": "GPTQ",
    "bit_width": 4,
    "group_size": 128,
    "symmetric": true,
    "damp_percent": 0.1,
    "desc_act": true,
    "act_group_aware": false,
    "true_sequential": true,

    "validate_outputs": true,
    "non_finite_check_batches": 1
  },
  "calibration": {
    "dataset": "wikitext",
    "subset": "wikitext-2-raw-v1",
    "split": "train",
    "num_sequences": 128,
    "num_text_samples": 128,
    "sequence_length": 512,
    "sampling": "seeded_shuffle",
    "seed": 42
  },
  "evaluation": {
    "dataset": "wikitext",
    "subset": "wikitext-2-raw-v1",
    "split": "test",
    "sequence_length": 512,
    "stride": 512,
    "metrics": [
      "perplexity",
      "latency_ms_per_token",
      "memory_total_bytes",
      "layerwise_weight_error",

  },
  "profiling": {

      16,
      32
    ]
  },
  "outputs": {
    "results_dir": "/resultsvol/results/modal_latency/qwen3_1p7b_gptq_baselines/R3_Q17B__bs1",
